codeReview.summary: The fix correctly wraps all three blocking git commands (branch, log, status) with tokio::task::spawn_blocking. The function signature remains async. build() is also made async to properly await get_git_snapshot(). All call sites are updated to use .await.

summary: Review passed. The get_git_snapshot() function now correctly uses spawn_blocking for all three git commands (git branch --show-current, git log --oneline -5 --decorate, git status --porcelain -b). The async pattern is consistent and error handling gracefully degrades when git commands fail. All call sites and tests properly use .await.
